M1036 (M0290) High Risk Factor- Obesity This field indicates if obesity is a risk factor, either present or past, likely to affect the patient's current health status and/or outcome. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1036_RSK_SMOKING M1036 (M0290) High Risk Factor- Smoking This field indicates if smoking is a risk factor, either present or past, likely to affect the patient's current health status and/or outcome. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x
